Module com.example.fasttype
Package com.example.fasttype.controller

Class GameController

java.lang.Object
com.example.fasttype.controller.GameController
All Implemented Interfaces:
GameView, javafx.fxml.Initializable
public class GameController extends Object implements javafx.fxml.Initializable, GameView
Main controller for the Fast Typing game.

Implements both Initializable (for FXML lifecycle) and GameView (the view contract). Wires all event handlers, delegates game logic to GameState, and drives UI updates.

Event handling is modularized using:

  • TimerHandler – inner class-based timer ticks
  • KeyboardAdapter – Enter key listener on the input field
  • MouseHoverAdapter – hover effects on the submit button
Version:
1.0
Author:
Lesly Zapata

  • Method Details

    • initialize

      public void initialize(URL location, ResourceBundle resources)
      Called by JavaFX after the FXML is loaded. Wires all event handlers and starts the first game.
      Specified by:
      initialize in interface javafx.fxml.Initializable
      Parameters:
      location - the URL location (unused)
      resources - the resource bundle (unused)

    • updateLevel

      public void updateLevel(int level)
      Updates the displayed level badge.
      Specified by:
      updateLevel in interface GameView
      Parameters:
      level - the current level number to display

    • updateTimer

      public void updateTimer(int seconds, int maxSeconds)
      Updates the countdown timer display and progress bar.
      Specified by:
      updateTimer in interface GameView
      Parameters:
      seconds - remaining seconds to show
      maxSeconds - maximum seconds for this level (used to compute progress ratio)

    • showWord

      public void showWord(String word)
      Displays the target word or phrase the player must type.
      Specified by:
      showWord in interface GameView
      Parameters:
      word - the word or phrase to display

    • showFeedback

      public void showFeedback(String message, boolean success)
      Displays a feedback message with a visual style depending on success or failure.
      Specified by:
      showFeedback in interface GameView
      Parameters:
      message - the feedback text (e.g., "¡Correcto!", "Incorrecto")
      success - true for a green/positive style, false for red/negative

    • clearFeedback

      public void clearFeedback()
      Hides the feedback label and clears the input field.
      Specified by:
      clearFeedback in interface GameView

    • updateScore

      public void updateScore(int score)
      Updates the score display.
      Specified by:
      updateScore in interface GameView
      Parameters:
      score - the current accumulated score

    • showGameOver

      public void showGameOver(int levelsCompleted, int finalScore, boolean won)
      Transitions the UI to the game-over screen, showing a summary.
      Specified by:
      showGameOver in interface GameView
      Parameters:
      levelsCompleted - number of levels the player successfully completed
      finalScore - the player's final score
      won - true if the player won (reached max level)

    • resetUI

      public void resetUI()
      Resets all UI components to their initial state for a new game.
      Specified by:
      resetUI in interface GameView
